question: Will CPI rise more than 1.0% in March 2026?
reasoning: The March 2026 CPI report has already been released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics, showing CPI increased only 0.3% in March 2026, well below the 1.0% threshold required for YES resolution. The market should resolve to NO with certainty. Despite earlier forecasts suggesting potential energy-driven inflation from geopolitical conflicts, the actual reported figure was much lower than anticipated.
key_factors: Official BLS data shows 0.3% monthly CPI increase
Market closes April 10 after data release
